issues.detail: The skill does not address error scenarios or edge cases for tool development.
The skill references a .claude-specific file path, indicating a minor platform assumption.

scenarios.name: B2B SaaS free tool ideation and validation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applied the 8-factor evaluation scorecard, the ideation pain-point framework, and explicit MVP scoping with build-vs-buy guidance; baseline proposed a generic calculator without scoring or gating analysis.

scenarios.name: Lead capture gating decision for an existing free tool
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used the four-option gating table (fully/partial/ungated+optional/ungated) with value-exchange copy guidance and tied lead capture to maintenance/feasibility tradeoffs; baseline gave generic 'add an email field' advice.
